goal: 实现 upstream-side fork PR import Action 自动化

summary.title: 新增 fork PR import Action
summary.what: 在 PR #185 的 fork contributor actor import / publish 基础上，新增 upstream-side 自动化路径：`mainline pr-import` 根据 GitHub PR 的 fork URL、head ref、head sha 发现 fork actor logs，选择唯一匹配的 author-sealed intent 后调用既有 `actor import`；新增 `pull_request_target` GitHub Action 在 fork PR merge 后自动执行 import 并更新 sticky PR comment；补充中英文 reference/README 和覆盖唯一匹配、无匹配、歧义、branch-only 拒绝、手动 import 后幂等的测试。
summary.why: 仅靠 PR #185 时，maintainer 仍需要在 fork PR merge 后本地执行 `mainline actor import`。upstream repo 安装一个安全的 Action 后，可以在不要求 fork repo 安装 Action、也不执行 fork 代码的前提下，把 contributor 已发布到 fork 的 Mainline actor log 自动接受进 upstream。
summary.user_goal: 实现 upstream-side fork PR import Action 自动化

decisions.chose: 新增独立 `.github/workflows/mainline-fork-pr-import.yml`，使用 `pull_request_target` 在 fork PR merged 后运行。
decisions.rationale: import 需要 upstream `contents: write` 去 push Mainline refs/notes，也需要 PR comment 权限；普通 `pull_request` token 不适合这个写入路径。workflow 只 checkout upstream base ref，fork refs 只作为 Git data fetch。

decisions.chose: `pr-import` 只把 GitHub PR metadata 当 locator，用它发现 fork actor refs 和匹配 sealed intent；真正接受仍委托 `ImportActorLog` 的信任边界。
decisions.rationale: GitHub PR body/comment/trailer 都不应该变成 sealed intent 证据；PR metadata 只能帮助定位 contributor 自己发布的 actor log。

decisions.chose: 按 `code_commit`、`code_tree`、`git_branch` 打分，只在唯一最佳匹配时导入；当 head sha/tree 可用时，单纯 branch 同名不足以自动导入。
decisions.rationale: fork branch 名称可复用或滞后，commit/tree 是更强证据；歧义和无匹配都应保持 upstream refs 不变，由评论提示 maintainer/contributor 后续处理。

decisions.chose: Action 复用 `actor import` 的 target-head 判断，手动 import 已发生时返回 `already_imported`，不重复接受同一 actor log。
decisions.rationale: maintainer 手动操作和 Action 重跑需要可交换，不能因自动化重复写 acceptance 或污染 review queue。

decisions.chose: 把 `pr-import` 加入 CLI auto-sync 列表。
decisions.rationale: GitHub Actions checkout 不保证带 Mainline notes/custom refs；写入并 push pin notes 前先 sync，可降低与 upstream refs 脱节的概率。

rejected.alternative: 把 fork import 塞进现有 `mainline-pr-intent.yml`
rejected.reason: 现有 workflow 是 `pull_request` 的同仓库评论路径，权限和安全模型不同；fork merge 后 import 需要 `pull_request_target` 和 write token，应独立隔离。

rejected.alternative: 只凭 branch 名称自动导入
rejected.reason: branch 名称不是稳定内容证据。head sha/tree 已知时仍要求至少命中 commit 或 tree，branch 只作为辅助加分。

rejected.alternative: 无匹配或歧义时自动选择一个 actor log
rejected.reason: 这会把不确定的 fork metadata 提升为 upstream 状态；当前实现只评论，不改 refs。

review_notes: 这是 stacked follow-up，base 是 PR #185 / intent int_08a92f4b；preflight 的 proposed overlap 来自该 base，不是互斥实现。
`go test ./internal/gitops ./internal/cli ./internal/engine -count=1 -timeout=180s` 中 gitops/cli 已通过，但 engine 包全量在既有 `TestDoctorDeletesOnlyMissingBranchDrafts` 处 180s 超时，未作为通过结论使用。
seal 时工作区仍有未跟踪 `.agents/`，该目录未 stage、未提交，属于本轮范围外本地文件。

architectural_claims: Fork PR merge automation is an upstream-side workflow layered on top of explicit actor-log import; it does not change the fork actor-log trust boundary introduced by PR #185.
`pr-import` converts PR lifecycle metadata into a locator and disambiguation signal, not into durable Mainline intent evidence.
The GitHub Action uses `pull_request_target` only against trusted upstream code and fetches fork refs as data for Mainline import.
behavioral_changes: New `mainline pr-import` command discovers fork actor logs, scores sealed intents against PR head commit/tree/branch, imports a unique best match, and reports `imported`, `already_imported`, `no_actor_logs`, `no_match`, or `ambiguous`.
When PR head sha/tree is available, branch-only matches are ignored to avoid importing stale same-branch intents.
New workflow runs after merged fork PRs, initializes a bot Mainline actor, retains PR head objects, runs `pr-import`, upserts a sticky PR comment, and fails only on command errors.
`pr-import` is auto-synced before execution so Actions checkouts fetch current upstream Mainline refs/notes before pushing updates.
Docs describe upstream Action installation, required permissions, safe checkout behavior, idempotency with manual import, and failure/ambiguity handling.
security_implications: The Action uses `pull_request_target` with write permissions, so it deliberately checks out only the upstream base ref and never checks out or executes fork code.
Fork actor logs are fetched as Git data and accepted only through the existing `actor import` validation path.
No-match and ambiguous states leave upstream actor refs and notes untouched.
Branch-only matches are not accepted when stronger PR head commit/tree evidence is available.
migration_notes: Repositories that want automation need to add the workflow file and allow GitHub Actions write permissions for contents, pull requests, and issues.
Existing manual `mainline actor import` remains valid and is idempotent with the new Action.
